creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: gerald
Date: Mon May 12 11:51:30 2014
New Revision: 353807
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353807
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353807/

Log:
  - Enable staging.
  - Add LICENSE (MIT).
  - Update URL which was broken.
  
  PR:		188701
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>
  Approved by:	portmgr (blanket pre-approval)

Modified:
  head/www/py-Lightbox/Makefile
  head/www/py-Lightbox/pkg-descr

Modified: head/www/py-Lightbox/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-Lightbox/Makefile	Mon May 12 11:39:23 2014	(r353806)
+++ head/www/py-Lightbox/Makefile	Mon May 12 11:51:30 2014	(r353807)
@@ -12,6 +12,8 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 MAINTAINER=	nivit@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Lightbox photo display widget for TurboGears
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}TurboGears>=1.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-turbogears
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}scriptaculous>=1.8.1:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-scriptaculous
 
@@ -19,5 +21,4 @@ USES=		zip
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/py-Lightbox/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-Lightbox/pkg-descr	Mon May 12 11:39:23 2014	(r353806)
+++ head/www/py-Lightbox/pkg-descr	Mon May 12 11:51:30 2014	(r353807)
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 Lightbox is a photo display widget for TurboGears
 
 Author: Lokesh Dhakar, Kevin Dangoor
-WWW:	http://www.turbogears.org/widgets/
+WWW: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/Lightbox
